channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Charlie Kirk Murder Suspect Changed Clothes Before Shooting, Agent Says
item.description: An investigator testified that video shows Tyler Robinson climbing over a railing onto a rooftop, crouching, and running to a spot overlooking where...

item.title: Midtown Manhattan building faces partial collapse risk after beams buckle
item.description: Several Manhattan buildings were evacuated Tuesday after construction workers found structural issues in an office building.

item.title: Satellites designed to detect wildfires from space aim to improve response
item.description: FireSat satellites use specialized cameras and imaging software to detect wildfires from orbit, as explained by Muon Space CEO Jonny Dyer.

item.title: US support for Israel declines as Democrats become more critical, poll finds
item.description: An AP-NORC poll shows a significant drop in support for Israel, ending decades of bipartisan backing.
